title: cuphea angustifolia
intro: Cuphea angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved cuphea or narrow-leaved trumpetflower, is a perennial plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cuphea angustifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cuphea angustifolia are typically made as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
